## Status Legend

Item-level markers:

- `[x]` — Verified (implementation complete, tests pass)
- `[ ]` — Pending (not started)
- `[~]` — In Progress (actively being worked on)
- `[!]` — Blocked (has dependency, can't proceed)
- `[-]` — Skipped (intentionally not implementing)

Milestone-level statuses (terminal: **Complete**, **Skipped**, **Deferred**):

- **Not Started** — no progress yet
- **In Progress** — some items verified or active
- **Blocked** — one or more items blocked
- **Complete** — every item is verified or skipped, with at least one verified
- **Skipped** — every item is skipped (no verified items)
- **Deferred** — closed by author via README `status: Deferred`; tracker treats this as terminal regardless of item state
